method: Merge era_1..era_4 matrices + fs_overlay by cluster name. Each cluster carries 4 era columns per channel (chatgpt, cc, fs_ctime, fs_mtime). Era 4 computed at merge time for completeness; Era 1-3 were the explicit Phase 3 sequences.
